summary: All relevant log lines are cited and text is accurate, but role assignments are inverted: the JWT near-expiry distractor is labelled 'trigger', ECONNREFUSED (the real root cause) is labelled 'trigger', and the POST /api/orders 500 consequence is labelled 'root_cause', forcing an engineer to re-derive the causal chain from scratch.
improvements: Reclassify the ECONNREFUSED / all-nodes-unreachable line as 'root_cause' rather than 'trigger'
Remove or label the JWT near-expiry lines as 'distractor' — they are unrelated to the Redis failure
Promote the 'session lookup failed' and HTTP 500 lines to 'consequence' role to reflect their position in the causal chain
